title: ferray-polynomial: integ missing lbnd (lower bound) and scl (scale) parameters
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial integ method has lbnd= (lower bound for definite integration) and scl= (scaling factor for the variable). ferray-polynomial integ() only takes m (number of integrations) and k (integration constants). The lbnd parameter sets the lower bound of integration, affecting the constant of integration. The scl parameter scales the variable of integration (useful with domain/window mapping). Add these parameters.
